articles.title: Trump’s teleprompter operator on unpaid leave for alleged prediction market bets on Trump speeches
articles.description:
White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said the president is aware of the situation, which she described as “unfortunate” and “a disgrace.”

The post Trump’s teleprompter operator on unpaid leave for alleged prediction market bets on Trump speeches appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump's teleprompter operator is on unpaid leave due to alleged betting activities.
White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt called the situation 'unfortunate' and 'a disgrace.'
Boston residents may face scrutiny over political staff conduct amid ongoing national discussions.

articles.title: Blanche to meet with Epstein accusers after demand from Republican senator crucial to confirmation
articles.description:
Epstein's case and the Justice Department's handling of millions of files related to his sex trafficking investigation have been a persistent political headache for the Trump administration.

The post Blanche to meet with Epstein accusers after demand from Republican senator crucial to confirmation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Blanche will meet with Epstein accusers to address concerns raised by Senator Lindsey Graham.
The meeting is crucial for Blanche's confirmation process amid ongoing scrutiny of Epstein's case.
Boston residents may see increased attention on sexual trafficking issues as a result of this meeting.

articles.title: Trump is expected to make election conspiracies a focus of his national address
articles.description:
Trump has offered only vague details about the address, scheduled for 9 p.m.

The post Trump is expected to make election conspiracies a focus of his national address appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trump's national address on election conspiracies is scheduled for 9 p.m. tonight.
Boston residents may see increased discussions on election integrity following Trump's address.
Local political groups are preparing for potential protests or rallies in response.

articles.title: Paul Pierce, Kevin Garnett to introduce Doc Rivers at Hall of Fame ceremony
articles.description:
Rivers picked Pierce and Garnett as his enshrinement presenters.

The post Paul Pierce, Kevin Garnett to introduce Doc Rivers at Hall of Fame ceremony appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Doc Rivers will be introduced by Paul Pierce and Kevin Garnett at the Hall of Fame.
The ceremony is set for July 16, 2026, celebrating Rivers' contributions to the Celtics.
This event highlights Boston's rich basketball history and honors local sports legends.
